description: Sarge revives with superhuman strength and begins to breach the Lighthouse, destabilizing and partially disintegrating as he exerts his powers. Daisy confronts him, sword in hand, ready to see how far his transformation has gone. Their emotional standoff climaxes when Sarge asks Daisy to kill him before he loses control, invoking memories of Coulson's selflessness. Daisy refuses, instead embracing him, recognizing Coulson’s influence.

transcript.line: Remember anything new after your second trip to the great beyond?
Get out of my way.
What do you know about Izel? Where is she taking Mack and Yo-Yo?
I said get out of my way.
I am not going anywhere, so talk.
I can't stay in this room.
Show me what you are.
You don't know what you're doing.
How many more times do I need to snap your neck? ‘Cause I'll do it again. Just let it out.
I need to find...
You are not going anywhere! Show me what you are.
We're locking down this sector...
Did you get that on the scanners?
What?
When he really started to wake up, did you record that data?
Well, of course, but is that really the most pressing issue?
What if he's trying to get back to Izel?
That's not gonna happen.
Hey, what exactly is your plan here?
Either he tells us what he knows about Izel or we find out if his sword can actually kill someone like him.
What if there's still a way to save what's left of Coulson?
Coulson died a year ago. I'm done pretending like that didn't happen.
Not sure what I would've done in Benson's shoes.
Yeah, me neither.
It wasn't just tactical... me being here.
I know. I would've come for you, too.
We're changing course.
Benson must've given her the coordinates. We need to make a move.
Well, her plan doesn't work without that.
I'm sorry.
Don't blame yourself.
You need this?
Be ready, Doctor.
You trying to steal from me? Did you really think that would work?
It worked well enough.
You accomplished nothing. He already told me where to find my temple.
Yeah. And now he'll tell my team.
We'll need hosts for when the gateway is open. Let them come.
Daisy. Hold your position. I'm on my way down to you.
No. Don't.
Daisy! He's tearing the doors off the place, trying to get out.
You said it yourself this is on me. I have to see this through.
What are you talking about?
If Izel can be killed, we have to understand how. She and Sarge are the same.
You don't have to do this. You don't have to face him alone.
The fact that you still think that this might be Coulson is exactly why it has to be me.
Looking for this?
You wanted to wake me up? I'm awake. This is what I am.
So I was right. You and Izel are the same. Both monsters.
Call me what you want. Doesn't make any difference. Give me the sword.
Not a chance.
Do you really think you can beat me?
Yes. This time, I'll actually kill you.
Go ahead. It'd be easier than doing it myself. Come on! What are you waiting for?! Do it! Kill me, Skye! If it works on me, it'll work on her. But you have to do it now, before I get any stronger.
Wait, wh...
You can't wait. Don't you understand? It's all coming back to me. The memories, the pain. Her song ringing through every bone in my body.
What memories?
It's too late for that. I'll lose control. I could kill everyone here. End it!
I can't do it.
You've always been capable of more than you think. Now do it. Do it! Do it.
You were gonna sacrifice yourself. It's what Coulson would've done.
I could kill you.
You won't.
